a.xlink:title: Select configure and construct one of the available 3d shapes.
A cone.
Returns an element from an iterable if it exists, or a default value if not.
A cuboid with edge, round, or chamfer corners.
Returns the list element or scalar numeric value if defined, otherwise returns the default value.
An ellipsoid.
A sector of an ellipsoid.
Output information message to console.
Get data table identifier name (or names).
Get the number of shape identifiers in data table.
Construct a named polyhedron.
A pyramid with quadrilateral base.
A pyramid with trilateral base formed by four equilateral triangles.
A three-dimensional star.
Convert a list of values to a concatenated string.
Convert an angle value from one unit to another.
Compute coordinates that round all of the vertices between each adjacent edges in 2D.
Compute a set of vertex coordinates for a triangle given its side lengths in 2D.
Test if a binary bit position of an integer value equals a test bit.
Format the function call stack as a string.
Return the first element of an iterable value.
Determine the bounding limits of a polytope.
Scale all coordinates dimensions proportionately to fit inside a region.
Return the second element of an iterable value.
Test the existence of a table row identifier, table column identifier, or both.
Get the table cell value for a specified row and column identifier.
Translate all coordinates dimensions.
Radially repeat copies of child objects about a z-axis radius.
Compute the angle between two lines or vectors in a 3d or 2d-space.
Compute coordinates for an n-sided regular polygon in 2D.
